uiStatesHandled: continue-disabled-until-min-length: PrimaryButton stays disabled (onPressed null) until the collected digits length >= 11; no server error surfaced

phone-normalized-to-digits-only: PhoneField strips all non-digits before it reaches the screen (_digits), display formatting is a local Nigerian formatter only — no country-code/dial-code is collected or sent
flow-variant-copy: signup vs login headline/subtitle/CTA copy is static/local (no backend data); both variants fire the same phone submission
help-hint: 'Use a different number / Need help?' clears the field and shows a local snackbar (login variant) — not a backend state
